title: custom function in where clause
poc: CREATE TABLE britney (id INT, name VARCHAR(255));
CREATE TABLE test (id INT, s VARCHAR(255));
select a.name, b.name, fstrcmp(a.name, b.name) from britney a, britney b where a.id > b.id and fstrcmp(a.name, b.name)>0.9 limit 10;
select char_length(a.s)-char_length(b.s) from test a, test b where a.id < b.id and char_length(a.s)-char_length(b.s)=0;
key_bug_features: custom function used in where clause
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE artists (id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(255), age INT CHECK (age >= 0));
CREATE TABLE songs (id INT PRIMARY KEY, title VARCHAR(255), artist_id INT REFERENCES artists(id));
INSERT INTO artists (id, name, age) VALUES (1, 'Britney Spears', 41), (2, 'Madonna', 65);
INSERT INTO songs (id, title, artist_id) VALUES (1, 'Toxic', 1), (2, 'Like a Prayer', 2);
SELECT a.name, s.title, fstrcmp(a.name, s.title) FROM artists a JOIN songs s ON a.id = s.artist_id WHERE fstrcmp(a.name, s.title) > 0.5 LIMIT 5;
